lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Got a medpack? I feel terrible.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened to you?

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Lizardman bite. There's always a fever after you've been bitten by one of those. I'm sure they don't clean their teeth.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I haven't got one.

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Try looking in the storage tents outside.

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Thanks for the medpack. I'm feeling a lot better now.

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: While you're here, you could help the war effort by fetching medpacks for my sick comrades. There'll be some in the storage tents outside.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll bear that in mind.

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Gimme a medpack - I need my strength back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened to you?

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: What happened to me is nothing compared to what's gonna happen to the filthy lizardman who did it. When I'm out of here, I'm gonna find him and fix him good.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I haven't got one.

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Try looking in the storage tents outside.

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Cheers. When I get back on my feet, there's gonna be one sorry lizardman out there.

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Those lizardmen gotta die! Ya hear me? I want them all dead! All of 'em!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll bear that in mind.

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Those ruffians hit me pretty hard. Have you got a medpack?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened to you?

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Gangsters. I was on patrol in the docklands, but those Piscarilius scumbags lured me into an alley and hit me with a stick.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I haven't got one.

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Try looking in the storage tents outside.

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Thanks. Hopefully I'll be back on patrol again soon.

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: We'll never keep on top of the crime in this kingdom at this rate. Maybe you could help deal with some gangsters while you're in Kourend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll bear that in mind.

sections.title: Using medpacks on a recovered soldier

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: I'm alright now. Try another soldier.

sections.title: Approximately ten seconds after being given a medpack

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Oh dearie me...

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Ooo-er...

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Relapse over here!

lines.speaker: Wounded soldier
lines.text: Medic!
